sections.markdown:
- Activity: Afternoon Run
- Started: 2026-01-15 14:29
- Distance: 4.1 km
- Moving time: 28:14
- Elapsed time: 28:31
- Elevation gain: 64.6 m
- Average heart rate: 177.3 bpm
- Max heart rate: 196 bpm
- Average watts: 182.4 W
- Average speed: 8.7 km/h

- Apple Health recorded `240` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `177.4 bpm`, ranging from `116.0` to `196.0 bpm`.
- First-half average HR was `169.5 bpm` and second-half average HR was `185.3 bpm` (+15.9 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `171.3 spm`, with a working range of `100.0` to `205.0 spm` after excluding `3` start-stop outliers below `100 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `173.4 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `169.2 spm` (-4.2 spm), which suggests some late turnover fade.

- Strava moving pace averaged `6:54 /km` across `4.094 km` in `28:14` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `6:48 /km` and second-half pace was `7:01 /km` (+13 s/km), so pace eased a little late.

- Strava summary HR came in at `177.3 bpm` average and `196 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `168.6 bpm` in the first half and `185.2 bpm` in the second (+16.6 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Moving time was `28:14` out of `28:31` elapsed (99.0%), which kept stoppage cost negligible.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `13` stop segments and `1.6%` stationary samples, so the run was mostly continuous with a few interruptions.

- Strava logged about `71.8 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `41.0 m` and `63.8 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `38.6 m` in the first half and `33.2 m` in the second, so the climbing load was split fairly evenly.
